=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
2002.08.27
Edmonton, Alberta, Canada
skyreach Centre

No info about lineage and taper

Disk 1
01 I Am The Man, Thomas
02 The Man In Me (Larry Campbell on pedal steel) 
03 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (Charlie Sexton on dobro and Larry Campbell on cittern) 
04 Boots Of Spanish Leather (Bob Dylan on harp)
05 Highway 61 Revisited 
06 Lay, Lady, Lay (Larry Campbell on pedal steel) 
07 Subterranean Homesick Blues (Larry Campbell on slide guitar) 
08 Cry A While (Larry Campbell on slide guitar) 
09 Mr. Tambourine Man 
10 Forever Young 
11 Tangled Up In Blue 



Disk 2
01 Summer Days (Tony Garnier on standup bass) 
02 Not Dark Yet 
03 The Wicked Messenger (Bob Dylan on harp) 
04 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35 (Larry Campbell on steel guitar) 
05 Like A Rolling Stone 
06 Knockin' On Heaven's Door (acoustic - Charlie Sexton on electric guitar) 
07 All Along The Watchtower 


Concert # 1449 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 19 of the 2002 US Summer Tour. 2002 concert # 66.
Concert # 50 with the 13th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal & guitar), Charlie Sexton (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1–4, 9-11, 17 acoustic with the band.
4, 14 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
1 Larry Campbell (mandolin).
2, 6 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
3 Larry Campbell (cittern).
3 Charlie Sexton (dobro).
7, 8 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
15 Larry Campbell (steel guitar).
1, 10, 17 Larry Campbell & Charlie Sexton (backup vocals).

 
11 new songs (61%) compared to previous concert. 2 new songs for this tour.
